overall.description: Static shot of a medieval fantasy dormitory room with wooden bunk beds and leaded glass windows. A character in white nightclothes briefly materializes in the center of the room at approximately 46 seconds before disappearing. High-quality game engine footage with atmospheric dim lighting.

entered.detail: wooden bunk bed with blue fabric curtains and rumpled bedding on both levels
tall wooden ladder with flat rungs leaning against the bunk bed frame
tall window with diamond-patterned leaded glass panes showing darkness outside
heavy dark green velvet curtains draped beside the window
low wooden storage chest or bench with various items resting on top

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval-style wooden dormitory room illuminated by dim ambient light from a leaded glass window. The space features a prominent bunk bed structure with a ladder, heavy green curtains, and scattered personal items. At approximately 46 seconds, a character wearing white nightclothes briefly materializes in the center of the room in a ghost-like apparition before disappearing, leaving the room empty once more.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective of a dim medieval dormitory that briefly transforms from a vacant space into a site of supernatural activity. It begins with a view of a wooden room illuminated by soft ambient light filtering through a leaded glass window, highlighting a bunk bed with heavy green curtains and scattered personal items. As the stillness persists, a character in white nightclothes suddenly materializes in the center of the room as a ghost-like apparition. The scene then shifts back to its original state as the figure vanishes, leaving the room empty once more under the same atmospheric lighting.
